rulings.Case Title: HEATHER DANIELS VS. MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC., et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 14, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT MERIDIAN FORECLOSURE SERVICE, FKA MTDS INC.,'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Meridian Foreclosure Service's Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Meridian was required to investigate beneficiary/servicer's compliance declaration per CCC 2923.5. (Opposition 4:19-20). Plaintiff's opposition fails to address any possible amendments. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: N. R. PATEL VS. DEREK JACKSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Otion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
